signals.title: Rocket Lab wins NASA award for three Electron launches
signals.summary:
NASA has selected Rocket Lab to launch a pair of science missions on three Electron rockets in 2027. 
 The post  Rocket Lab wins NASA award for three Electron launches  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.summary: Pentagon research has been hampered by backlogged security clearances, limited funds to build or refurbish labs and a slow and difficult hiring process.

signals.title: DOE emergency orders are incurring additional costs. What are the benefits?

signals.title: Judge blocks Trump's rule limiting federal student loans for certain grad school borrowers

signals.title: Trump meets munitions makers amid push to replenish weapons stockpiles
signals.summary: Pentagon negotiators are pressing contractors to move much faster to boost output.

signals.title: Ukraine’s top strike-drone maker moves into ballistic missile defense
signals.summary: Fire Point's drones already fly most of Kyiv's strikes inside Russia. With Germany's Hensoldt, the company is now building Freyja, a homegrown alternative.

signals.summary: The U.S. and Russia are fielding the same balloons used by Ukraine that bait air defenses and now launch missiles.

signals.title: As Social Security faces trust fund depletion, some Washington lawmakers call for taxing high earners
signals.summary: High earners may only contribute Social Security payroll taxes for part of the year. As the program faces funding woes, some lawmakers say that should change.

signals.title: A month into EDAM, the data already shows two very different grids
signals.summary: The new Western day-ahead market is starting to show where resource mixes, operating constraints and carbon policies create fundamentally different economic outcomes.

signals.summary: Her comments come shortly after President Donald Trump ordered an investigation into Big Oil, accusing them of "gouging" consumers.

signals.summary: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.

signals.summary: The stock's volatile run appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social media enthusiasm.

signals.summary: The moves would appear to make Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh the most obvious possible successors to JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon.

signals.title: Poland buys V-BAT drones to boost Baltic Sea naval operations

signals.title: GM reveals 2027 GMC Sierra pickup with new V-8 engines, redesigned styling
signals.summary: The new GMC Sierra trucks are crucial to GM's sales and earnings, especially highly profitable luxury Denali and off-road AT4 models.

signals.title: Luxury spending now driven by experiences and 'inheritourism'

signals.title: GameStop’s CEO just sacrificed a $35 billion pay package. Here’s how it could impact his effort to buy eBay

signals.title: Darden Restaurants earnings beat estimates but Olive Garden growth weakens

signals.title: U.S. giving topped $600 billion for the first time last year. Megadonors and bequests are to thank
signals.summary: The stock market rally turbocharged charitable giving in 2025, but primarily from wealthy donors.

signals.summary: Leagues, teams and media networks are increasingly meeting younger fans on social media as platforms like TikTok, Roblox and YouTube capture most of their time.

signals.summary: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.

signals.title: Gold hovers around $4,000, silver holds below $60 — has the shimmer worn off the precious metal rally?
signals.summary: Gold is down almost 8% so far this year, while silver has shed more than 20%.

signals.title: MDA Space wins contract for Radarsat replenishment satellite
signals.summary:
MDA Space will build a radar imaging satellite for the Canadian Space Agency as the government studies options for a next-generation satellite system. 
 The post  MDA Space wins contract for Radarsat replenishment satellite  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Vast signs additional partners for commercial space station microgravity research
signals.summary:
Commercial space station company Vast announced June 24 the addition of several companies and organizations to its network of partners for microgravity research and manufacturing. 
 The post  Vast signs additional partners for commercial space station microgravity research  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: How space weather could bust the AI boom
signals.summary:
America’s electric grid is entering a period of unprecedented strain. Utilities across the country are scrambling to keep up as power-hungry AI data centers expand at a staggering pace, often […] 
 The post  How space weather could bust the AI boom  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Vantor selects BAE Systems to build next-generation imaging satellites
signals.summary:
WASHINGTON — Vantor has chosen BAE Systems to build its next generation of high-resolution imaging satellites. The selection reunites Vantor with the former Ball Aerospace business that helped develop DigitalGlobe’s […] 
 The post  Vantor selects BAE Systems to build next-generation imaging satellites  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SpaceX launches secretive Starfall reentry demo mission
signals.summary:
SpaceX launched the first test flight of its Starfall reentry capsule June 23, but the mission remained as secretive as the program itself. 
 The post  SpaceX launches secretive Starfall reentry demo mission  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: OHB raises funding for expansion, acquisitions
signals.summary:
German space company OHB will raise about half a billion euros through a stock sale to allow the company to expand facilities and pursue potential acquisitions. 
 The post  OHB raises funding for expansion, acquisitions  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US, UK, France, Germany raise alarm about Chinese patrols off eastern Taiwan
signals.summary: The countries said Chinese patrols off the coast of Taiwan threaten regional stability and freedom of navigation.

signals.title: China studied US stealth aircraft — and learned the wrong lessons
signals.summary: An Air Force researcher said China's assessments of U.S. stealth capabilities "diverge from technical reality and operational practice."

signals.title: Airstrike killed senior ISIS commander in Syria, CENTCOM says
signals.summary: A senior Islamic State leader was killed by an airstrike last week, Central Command announced on Wednesday.

signals.title: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
signals.summary: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

signals.title: Tank maker KNDS plans stock market listing, Germany to buy 40% stake
signals.summary: The firm showed a proposed battle tank at Eurosatory defense exhibition in Paris boasting a French turret and gun mounted on a German Leopard 2 chassis.

signals.title: US Senate joins House in voting to halt Iran war
signals.summary: It marks the first time both chambers approved directing a president to remove armed forces from hostilities since the War Powers Act was adopted in 1973.

signals.title: Commercial Space Federation (CSF) Welcomes New Associate Member
signals.summary:
June 23, 2026 – Washington, D.C.—The Commercial Space Federation (CSF) is pleased to welcome Sophia Space, a company advancing orbital computing infrastructure for the next generation of space-based data processing, […] 
 The post  Commercial Space Federation (CSF) Welcomes New Associate Member  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Sophia selects Apex bus for on-orbit computing demonstration
signals.summary:
SAN FRANCISCO – Sophia Space announced the selection June 22 of an Apex bus for its first orbital computing node. Pasadena, California-based Sophia plans to demonstrate its Thermal Integrated LEO […] 
 The post  Sophia selects Apex bus for on-orbit computing demonstration  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US Army tests fire control software that helps moving vehicles kill drones
signals.summary: The Army has successfully tested software designed to help vehicle-mounted weapons shoot down drones while both the target and the vehicle are moving.

signals.title: Frustrating Israel, fiber-optic killer drone technology has arrived in southern Lebanon
signals.summary: Analysts believe that any military engaged in conflict will, in one form or another, encounter technologies first seen in Ukraine.

signals.title: India’s three new naval ships boost maritime firepower
signals.summary: The country has made strides in constructing complex naval platforms but remains dependent on foreign suppliers for key technologies.

signals.title: Leonardo, Baykar tout in-flight control of Kizilelma drone from a M-346 jet trainer
signals.summary: Following an autonomous taxi and take-off, the Kizilelma autonomously linked to the M-346 using “an advanced radio frequency data exchange system."

signals.title: US Marines in Okinawa receive first MADIS, NMESIS platforms
signals.summary: The delivery marks the service’s latest integration of modernized defenses in the increasingly contested Indo-Pacific.
